typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	Body_Failure as string (),
	Body_Succ as string (),
	DepartmentList as string (),
	DepartmentName as string (),
	FilePath as string (),
	MailRecepient as string (),
	MailSender as string (),
	MailSubject as string (),
	RecievedFilePath as string (),
	Status as string (),
	var_BCC as string (),
	var_CC as string (),
	var_datediff as integer (),
	var_Error_Description as string (),
	var_project as string (),
	DestinationFolder as string (),
	LocalFolder as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT * FROM Employee_master WHERE DepartmentName = ?',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource sink(input(
		Email as string,
		FirstName as string,
		DepartmentName as string,
		HireDate as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		LastName as string,
		EmployeeID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Email,
		FirstName,
		DepartmentName,
		HireDate,
		LastName,
		EmployeeID)) ~> FlatFileDestination
